title: Lepa's PvP Essentials
description: PvP, Has everything for PvP and a Custom GUI
body:
This is a PvP pack made specifically to people who want to PvP. This pack contains these following features:
- Low Weapons
- Low Fire
- Low Shield
- Lower utilities
- Better Powdered Snow visibility
- No Pumpkin Overlay
- And More

You may not:

- Modify or redistribute this pack without permission
- Use any assets in other packs
- Use this pack for commercial purposes
- Credit must be given to the original creator Foxi.
